agent.name: Sarah Mitchell
agent.notable_actions: Offered loyalty discount of 50% for 3 months; logged advanced strength training as high-priority content request

resolution.summary: Cancellation averted by offering 3 months at $14.99 (50% discount). Root cause — content staleness and lack of advanced strength training — was not resolved. Customer set an explicit deadline: will cancel permanently if advanced strength content is not live by April 15.

key_moments.description: Customer explains content has gone stale — same workouts for 6 months
key_moments.trigger: Frustration with lack of new content despite previous promises

key_moments.description: Customer reveals they were told 'big things coming in Q1' 3 months ago — nothing delivered
key_moments.trigger: Prior unmet promise erodes trust further

key_moments.description: Customer discloses they have already started using competitor FitFlow
key_moments.trigger: Competitor already in use — churn risk becomes concrete

key_moments.description: Customer accepts 3-month discount offer with explicit condition
key_moments.trigger: Half-price offer with upcoming advanced content promise

key_moments.description: Customer thanks agent: 'You've been helpful at least'
key_moments.trigger: Agent's empathy and concrete offer acknowledged

pain_points.description: Content library has stagnated — no new classes added in approximately 6 months. Advanced strength training is severely underrepresented (12 beginner-level classes only).
pain_points.verbatim_quote: the last, I don't know, six months? It feels like nothing new has been added. I'm doing the same workouts I was doing in October.

pain_points.description: Strength training category lacks intermediate-to-advanced programming. Customer has been lifting for years and needs progression beyond beginner level.
pain_points.verbatim_quote: if you're into weightlifting there's like twelve classes total. And the ones that are there are beginner level. I've been lifting for years, I need intermediate to advanced programming.

pain_points.description: Previous feedback submitted (survey + prior call) had no visible impact — erodes trust in feedback loop.
pain_points.verbatim_quote: I've given this feedback before. I even filled out that survey you sent last year. Nothing changed.

motivations.description: Customer joined for HIIT series with Coach Daniels — specific content drove original purchase decision
Willing to stay at half price to see if new content delivers — price sensitivity is real but secondary to content

competitor_mentions.name: FitFlow
competitor_mentions.detail: Friend recommended FitFlow. Customer has already started using it. Cited better strength training section as the reason.

intent.primary: Cancel premium subscription due to stale content and lack of advanced strength training
intent.secondary: Seeking assurance that new advanced content will be delivered before committing to stay

factors: Advanced strength training absent from catalogue
Prior feedback submitted with no visible result
Previous agent promise (Q1 content drop) unmet
churn_risk.save_condition: Customer will cancel permanently if advanced strength training content is not live by April 15, 2026

action_items.action: Verify advanced strength training content is live before April 15, 2026 and proactively notify this customer
Log advanced strength training as high-priority content request — already done by agent
Monitor this account for cancellation signal in April if content launch is delayed

review_reasons: Conditional save detected: customer's retention is time-bound. Follow-up required before April 15, 2026.
Competitor already in active use (FitFlow) — elevated churn risk if content deadline missed.
